sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32274" key="e)kktupe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκκτῠπέω</orth>, <sense id="n32274.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">burst forth with noise,</tr_> of thunder, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.118</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
